name: LoanMax Title Loans
description_short: At 2882 North Ave in Grand Junction, CO, LoanMax Title Loans provides same-day title loans and fast cash.
description_long:
LoanMax Title Loans operates at 2882 North Ave in Grand Junction, CO, serving the community with accessible title loan services from a convenient standalone location. The store is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday mornings 9 AM to 2 PM, providing flexible hours for working residents. This storefront location makes it easy for Grand Junction neighbors to stop by during their regular routines.

At this 2882 North Ave location, LoanMax Title Loans offers title loans on vehicles and payday advances to help with unexpected expenses. The team handles applications quickly, with many customers approved and funded on the same day. For specific questions about your situation or to discuss your application, call the Grand Junction office at 970-438-4410.

For Grand Junction residents considering a title loan, bring your vehicle title, valid ID, and proof of income when you visit 2882 North Ave. Title loans are typically processed quickly, making them useful when you need emergency cash between paychecks. LoanMax Title Loans is built to get you approved and funded fast.
pros: Quick cash access up to $10,000 with minimal documentation (vehicle, ID, title only)
Multiple payment methods accepted (cash, check, debit card, Western Union)
Licensed and regulated in multiple states with published compliance information
Online account access and online payment capability available
Extended hours including Saturday service (9 AM–2 PM) for in-person visits
Multiple nearby locations in Detroit metro area (5 locations within 22 miles)
Clear disclosure of state-specific consumer protections and rate schedules
cons: Title loans carry high interest rates and fees; exact APR not disclosed on website
Risk of vehicle repossession if loan is not repaid
Loan approval contingent on vehicle evaluation and ability to repay (not guaranteed)
No information provided about alternative loan products or financial counseling
Website lacks transparency on typical loan terms, repayment schedules, or cost examples
best_for: Individuals with immediate cash needs who own a vehicle outright or with minimal lien
Borrowers who need emergency funds but cannot qualify for traditional unsecured loans
People who prefer in-person lending transactions in the Detroit metro area
diagnosis: LoanMax Title Loans is best for consumers facing genuine emergency cash needs who own a vehicle and have exhausted other borrowing options. However, borrowers must understand that title loans are expensive short-term credit products with substantial costs and significant default risk, including potential vehicle loss. This product is appropriate only for short-term liquidity gaps, not ongoing financial needs.
services: Same-day or next-day cash access (implied by emergency-cash category)
In-person lending at Southgate location (12850 Eureka Road)
Multiple payment method acceptance (cash, check, debit card, Western Union)
meta_description: Grand Junction, CO - LoanMax Title Loans at 2882 North Ave. Same-day title loans and quick cash advances.
